events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Since the submittal is missing the quantity takeoff needed to establish total scope, I marked it `needs_more_info` (low risk, no observed defects) rather than pass/fail, and listed the specific documentation needed to close the checkpoint.
